conditions.leftValue: ={{ String($("Prepare Sheet Meta").item.json.folderId || "").trim() !== "" && String($("Prepare Sheet Meta").item.json.spreadsheetId || "").trim() !== "" }}

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const payload = $("Prepare Write Payload").item.json || {}; const spreadsheetId = encodeURIComponent(payload.spreadsheetId || ""); return "https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/" + spreadsheetId + "/values:batchUpdate"; })() }}
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const payload = $("Prepare Write Payload").item.json || {}; const data = Array.isArray(payload.batchData) ? payload.batchData : []; return { valueInputOption: payload.valueInputOption || "RAW", data }; })() }}

parameters.content:
## INPUT FIELDS

`action`: `ensureAndWrite|ensureSheet|upsertRows`
- example: `ensureAndWrite`
`spreadsheetId`: ID spreadsheet co san
- example: `1AbCdEfGhIjK`
`spreadsheetName`: title khi can tao moi
- example: `Book Review Sessions`
`sheetName`: ten tab
- example: `Sessions`
`folderId`: Drive folder de move spreadsheet
- example: `1FolderAbCdEf`
`rows`: mang 2 chieu de ghi
- example: `[["scene_id","tts_status"],["scene_001","success"]]`
`range`: range ghi du lieu (optional)
- example: `Sessions!A1`
`upsertByHeader`: neu co, se upsert theo cot key header
- example: `scene_id`
`valueInputOption`: `RAW|USER_ENTERED`
- example: `RAW`
`failOnNoUpdates`: optional, mac dinh false
- example: `false`

### Quick examples
`upsertRows` init sheet -> `{ action: "upsertRows", spreadsheetId: "1AbCdEfGhIjK", sheetName: "Media", range: "Media!A1", rows: [["scene_id","tts_status"],["scene_001",""]] }`
`upsertRows` theo key -> `{ action: "upsertRows", spreadsheetId: "1AbCdEfGhIjK", sheetName: "Media", upsertByHeader: "scene_id", rows: [["scene_id","tts_status"],["scene_001","success"]] }`

## IMPORTANT LINE: NORMALIZE

Flow:
- When Executed by Another Workflow
- Normalize Request

Sinh ra cac flags quan trong:
- `shouldEnsure`
- `shouldWrite`
- `shouldMove`
- `shouldCreateSheet`
- `shouldCallWriteApi`

## IMPORTANT LINE: ENSURE

Flow:
- If Need Create Sheet
- Create Sheet OR Use Existing Sheet
- Prepare Sheet Meta

Output chinh:
- `spreadsheetId`
- `spreadsheetUrl`
- `createStatusCode`

## IMPORTANT LINE: MOVE

Flow:
- If Should Move Sheet
- Move Sheet To Folder

Chi chay khi co `folderId` va co `spreadsheetId`.

## IMPORTANT LINE: WRITE

Flow:
- If Should Write Rows
- Read Current Sheet Rows
- Prepare Write Payload
- Write Sheet Rows (`values:batchUpdate`)
- Build Result

upsertRows behavior:
- Co `upsertByHeader` -> upsert theo key header (match: update, miss: append)
- Khong co `upsertByHeader`:
  - Co `range` -> write vao range do
  - Khong co `range` -> append cuoi sheet

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const meta = $("Prepare Sheet Meta").item.json || {}; const spreadsheetId = encodeURIComponent(meta.spreadsheetId || ""); const range = encodeURIComponent((meta.sheetName || "Sheet1") + "!A1:ZZ"); return "https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/" + spreadsheetId + "/values/" + range; })() }}
